zh.lifeSummary: 當John Peter Mohr於1738年1月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州約克皮亞 博特姆 堂史普時，他的父親Johannes Peter Mohr35歲，母親Maria Catharina Mattheis39歲。他於1762年6月6日與Mary Magdalena Stauffer在美國賓夕法尼亞州約克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1796年11月18日在美國賓夕法尼亞州約克帕拉迪瑟 堂史普享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Peter Mohr于1738年1月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州約克皮亞 博特姆 堂史普时，他的父亲Johannes Peter Mohr35岁，母亲Maria Catharina Mattheis39岁。他于1762年6月6日与Mary Magdalena Stauffer在美国宾夕法尼亚州約克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1796年11月18日在美国宾夕法尼亚州約克帕拉迪瑟 堂史普享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mohr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived in a fen, Middle Low German mōr.
German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and Dutch (of German origin): nickname for a man of swarthy complexion, from Middle High German mōr, German Mohr, and Middle Dutch moor ‘Moor’.
German: from a short form of an old personal name, Morhart (see Morath ).

variants.name: Mor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Arie, Avi, Eliezer, Erez, Etty, Haim, Hedva, Ilan, Itai, Moshe, Noam.
Jewish (Israeli): shortened and Hebraicized form of some original Ashkenazic surname starting in Mor-.

variants.name: Morath
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Gaston.  German Erhardt, Kurt.
South German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Morhart (see Morhardt ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace).

variants.name: Moerke
meanings: German (Mörke): variant of Möhrke, from a diminutive of Mohr .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1749: York, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Pennsylvania, United States
Historical Boundaries: 1749: York, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Pennsylvania, United States
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Second State to Ratify U.S. Constitution
historicEvents.description: On December 12, 1787, Pennsylvania ratified the U.S. Constitution.

en.lifeSummary: When John Peter Mohr was born on 4 January 1738, in Peach Bottom Township, York, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, his father, Johannes Peter Mohr, was 35 and his mother, Maria Catharina Mattheis, was 39. He married Mary Magdalena Stauffer on 6 June 1762, in York, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 18 November 1796, in Paradise Township, York, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Peter Mohr est né le 4 janvier 1738, à Peach Bottom Township, York, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Johannes Peter Mohr, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Maria Catharina Mattheis, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Mary Magdalena Stauffer le 6 juin 1762, à York, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 18 novembre 1796, à Paradise Township, York, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Peter Mohr am 4. Januar 1738 in Peach Bottom Township, York, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johannes Peter Mohr 35 und seine Mutter Maria Catharina Mattheis 39. Er hat am 6. Juni 1762 in York, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Magdalena Stauffer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 18. November 1796 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Paradise Township, York, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Peter Mohr è nato il il 4 gennaio 1738 nel Peach Bottom Township, York, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Johannes Peter Mohr, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Maria Catharina Mattheis, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Mary Magdalena Stauffer il 6 giugno 1762, nel York, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Peter Mohrが1738年1月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州ヨークピーチ ボットオム トウンシュイップで生まれた時，父Johannes Peter Mohrは35歳，母Maria Catharina Mattheisは39歳であった。1762年6月6日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ヨークでMary Magdalena Staufferと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1796年11月18日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ヨークパーアディゼ トウンシュイップで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Peter Mohr(이)가 1738년 1월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 요르크 피치 벗톰 타운시프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johannes Peter Mohr(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Catharina Mattheis(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1762년 6월 6일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 요르크에서 Mary Magdalena Stauffer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1796년 11월 18일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 요르크 파라디스 타운시프에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Peter Mohr nasceu em 4 de janeiro de 1738, em Peach Bottom Township, York, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, seu pai, Johannes Peter Mohr, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Maria Catharina Mattheis, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Magdalena Stauffer em 6 de junho de 1762, em York, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1796, em Paradise Township, York, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Peter Mohr родился 4 января 1738 г. в местности пич боттом тоуншип, ерк, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Johannes Peter Mohr было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Catharina Mattheis, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Magdalena Stauffer 6 июня 1762 г. в местности ерк, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 18 ноября 1796 г. в местности парадис тоуншип, ерк, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Peter Mohr nació el 4 de enero de 1738, en Peach Bottom Township, York, Pensilvania, British Colonial America, su papá, Johannes Peter Mohr, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Maria Catharina Mattheis, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Mary Magdalena Stauffer el 6 de junio de 1762, en York, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1796, en Paradise Township, York, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 58 años.
